name: Vitakraft Vita Smart Gourmet Fortified Daily Cockatiel & Lovebird Food, 4-lb bag
description: The Vitakraft Vita Smart Gourmet Cockatiel and Lovebird Food is designed specifically for your Cockatiel or Lovebird, and is packed full of good stuff to keep your feathered friend flap-happy. This premium grain, fruit and nut seed mix delivers complete nutrition. With ingredients including millet, sunflower seeds, nutriberries, peas, papaya, carrots, coconut and pineapple, it’s like a super tasty fiesta in a bag. Unique ingredients like dried chamomile and dried rose hips help ensure your bird will never be bored. Aloe vera concentrate and other nutrients support your bird’s skin health.
